nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Polls every 15 min. Sends one digest per poll for each missed day until caught up. 5 days offline = 5 digests over ~75 minutes.

nodes.name: Check if daily digest is due

parameters.query:
SELECT
  (last_fetched_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata')::date::text AS period_start,
  ((last_fetched_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata')::date + 1)::text AS period_end
FROM sync_state
WHERE source = 'digest_daily'
  AND NOW() >= (((last_fetched_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata')::date + 1)::timestamp + INTERVAL '9 hours') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata'

nodes.notes: last_fetched_at = start of next undigested day (midnight IST). Fires when we're past 9am IST of the day AFTER that — meaning the period day is fully complete. Returns 0 rows if nothing is due.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT count(*) FROM raw_events
   WHERE ingested_at >= $1::date AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata'
     AND ingested_at < $2::date AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata') AS raw_ingested,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM parsed_transactions
   WHERE parsed_at >= $1::date AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata'
     AND parsed_at < $2::date AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata'
     AND ebk_status = 'written') AS written_to_ebk,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM parsed_transactions
   WHERE parsed_at >= $1::date AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata'
     AND parsed_at < $2::date AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata'
     AND parse_method = 'groq') AS groq_calls,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM failed_events
   WHERE failed_at >= $1::date AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata'
     AND failed_at < $2::date AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata'
     AND resolved = FALSE) AS open_failures,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM dedup_log
   WHERE first_seen_at >= $1::date AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata'
     AND first_seen_at < $2::date AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata') AS deduplicated,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) FROM parsed_transactions
   WHERE direction = 'debit'
     AND transaction_time >= date_trunc('month', NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata') AS month_spend

SELECT fe.id, fe.stage, fe.error_message, re.subject, re.sender, fe.failed_at FROM failed_events fe LEFT JOIN raw_events re ON fe.raw_event_id = re.id WHERE fe.resolved = FALSE ORDER BY fe.failed_at DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT id, input_fragment, parsed_fields, called_at FROM groq_parse_log WHERE promoted = FALSE ORDER BY called_at DESC LIMIT 5

parameters.jsCode:
const period = $('Check if daily digest is due').first().json; const stats = $('Query period stats').first().json; const failures = $('Query open failures').all().map(i => i.json); const groqItems = $('Query unreviewed GroqCloud').all().map(i => i.json); const periodDate = new Date(period.period_start + 'T00:00:00+05:30') .toLocaleDateString('en-IN', { dateStyle: 'full' }); let failureRows = failures.length === 0 ? 'None — all clear' : failures.map(f => ` ${f.id} ${f.stage} ${f.subject || '—'} ${f.error_message?.substring(0, 80) || '—'} ` ).join(''); let groqRows = groqItems.length === 0 ? 'None pending' : groqItems.map(g => ` ${g.id} ${g.input_fragment?.substring(0, 80) || '—'} ${JSON.stringify(g.parsed_fields)?.substring(0, 100) || '—'} ` ).join(''); const html = `

Finance pipeline — daily digest

${periodDate}

Activity for ${periodDate}

MetricValue
Emails ingested${stats.raw_ingested}
Transactions written to ezbookkeeping${stats.written_to_ebk}
Deduplicated (dropped)${stats.deduplicated}
GroqCloud fallback calls${stats.groq_calls}
Open failures${stats.open_failures}
Month-to-date spend${Number(stats.month_spend).toLocaleString('en-IN', { style: 'currency', currency: 'INR' })}

Open failures (manual review needed)

${failureRows}
IDStageEmail subjectError

GroqCloud parses not yet promoted to regex

${groqRows}
IDInput fragmentParsed fields

To mark a failure resolved: UPDATE failed_events SET resolved=TRUE WHERE id=<id>;
To promote a Groq pattern to regex: see RUNBOOK.md

`; return [{ json: { subject: `Finance digest — ${periodDate}`, html, period_end: period.period_end } }];

nodes.name: Advance digest cursor

parameters.query: UPDATE sync_state SET last_fetched_at = $1::date AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kolkata', updated_at = NOW() WHERE source = 'digest_daily'

nodes.notes: Advances last_fetched_at by exactly 1 day (to period_end). Does NOT jump to NOW(). Next poll will check if another day is pending.

main.node: Check if daily digest is due
